root.sql:
SELECT vr_nsk_015_002000.memname, vr_nsk_015_002000.membership_no, vr_nsk_015_002000.salary_amount, vr_nsk_015_002000.member_group_name, vr_nsk_015_002000.loan_requestment_no, vr_nsk_015_002000.loan_request_amount, vr_nsk_015_002000.loan_approve_amount, vr_nsk_015_002000.loan_contract_no, vr_nsk_015_002000.appove_officer, vr_nsk_015_002000.first_install, vr_nsk_015_002000.first_period, vr_nsk_015_002000.begining_of_contract, vr_nsk_015_002000.loan_payment_type_desc, vr_nsk_015_002000.start_keep_date, vr_nsk_015_002000.total_old_loan, vr_nsk_015_002000.total_oldint, vr_nsk_015_002000.buy_share, vr_nsk_015_002000.fee_amount, vr_nsk_015_002000.real_recieve, vr_nsk_015_002000.receipt_no, vr_nsk_015_002000.entry_id, vr_nsk_015_002000.loan_objective_description, vr_nsk_015_002000.bank_acc_no, vr_nsk_015_002000.bank_name, vr_nsk_015_002000.total_share_value , vr_nsk_015_002000.loan_type , vr_nsk_015_002000.loan_type_description FROM vr_nsk_015_002000 ,sc_lon_m_rule where 1=1 and vr_nsk_015_002000.begining_of_contract between '!begining_of_contract_1!' and '!begining_of_contract_2!' and vr_nsk_015_002000.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type
/*WHERE*/
